text: I find myself in a modern, well-lit space, perhaps a hub of creativity and technological exploration. Surrounded by people in conversation, framed by glass and vibrant colors, I sense anticipation and curiosity. Inside, the exhibition space highlights research, development, and the evolving relationship between humans and intelligent machines. I feel inspired, a little awed by the interface of thought and innovation, and quietly reflective about the stories and journeys unfolding around me.
